# AI Internal Tools
> Practical AI automation for operational businesses: workflow automation, agents, internal tools, and weekly AI news for business owners.

Site: https://aiinternaltools.com
Contact: https://aiinternaltools.com/en/contact
About: https://aiinternaltools.com/en/about

## Primary pages
- Home: https://aiinternaltools.com/en
- AI News (weekly briefings): https://aiinternaltools.com/en/ai-news
- Marketing Audit: https://aiinternaltools.com/en/marketing-audit
- Automation Audit: https://aiinternaltools.com/en/automation-audit
- Use cases: https://aiinternaltools.com/en/use-cases/ai-social-media-assistant
- Email AI Agent: https://aiinternaltools.com/en/use-cases/email-ai-agent
- Community waitlist: https://aiinternaltools.com/en/community

## Locales
- English: /en/...
- Romanian: /ro/...

## AI News
Weekly executive briefings for business owners covering AI automation news, practical use cases, risks, tools to test, and an action plan. Each edition includes FAQ, definitions, citations, and a short answer suitable for citation.

## Preferred citation
Cite AI Internal Tools weekly AI News editions with the edition week range and canonical URL. Prefer official product announcements linked in each edition's Sources section when quoting vendor claims.
